title: Trust Attestation (TA)
description: Signed reputation statement about an agent. Distinct from authorization. See SPEC.md §4.5. Trust Attestations MUST NOT be stored in the registry; they are held by the issuer, the agent (as a portfolio), or an external attestation index.

subject.description: AXIS ID of the agent being attested.

scope.description: Domain of the attestation. Semantics are attestor-defined in v0.1; v0.3 introduces a standard scope vocabulary.

level.description: Attestor-defined level. Semantics out-of-band. v0.2 introduces a standardized credentialSubject schema.

signature.description: Ed25519 signature by the attestor, base64url-encoded (no padding).
